facts.subject: Council Decision on the existence of an excessive deficit
facts.object: when the excessive deficit in the Member State concerned has, in the view of the Council, been corrected
facts.natural_language: A Council Decision regarding an excessive deficit must be abrogated when the Council determines that the deficit in the concerned Member State has been corrected.

facts.object: in the Protocol on the excessive deficit procedure by reference to the European System of Integrated Economic Accounts, second edition
